response.original_title: the GazettE STANDING LIVE TOUR 14 HERESY LIMITED
response.overview: -The GazettE’s STANDING LIVE TOUR14 HERESY LIMITED —再定義— (Saiteigi) was an exclusive, fan-club-only tour held in 2014. The trio of tours was dedicated to "redefining" or re-arranging tracks from their past albums, performing in intimate, raw live-house venues for "HERESY" (official fan club) members only.The tour featured three distinct scenes/phases exploring different eras of their discography, showcasing deep cuts and fan favorites:  SCENE 01 [DISORDER × NIL]  SCENE 02 [STACKED RUBBISH × DIM]  SCENE 03 [TOXIC × DIVISION]
response.title: the GazettE STANDING LIVE TOUR 14 HERESY LIMITED
